notes_zh:
- **修复** 关闭接力模式时根据先前状态决定是否恢复监听
- **新增** 窗口菜单「始终保持在最前」(⇧⌘T)
- **优化** 接力面板加宽，操作按钮显示文字标签
- **新增** 接力面板「清空所有」按钮
notes_en:
- **Fix** Exiting relay mode now restores previous monitoring state
- **New** Window > Always on Top menu item (⇧⌘T)
- **Improve** Relay panel widened with text-labeled toolbar buttons
- **New** Clear All button in relay panel
